name: env-forge-mcp
description: MCP server for .env file validation, parsing, comparison, and generation. Every project uses .env files.

tools.name: parse_env
tools.description: Parse a .env file content and return all key-value pairs with metadata.

tools.name: validate_env
tools.description: Validate .env content against an expected schema (list of required keys).

tools.name: generate_env_template
tools.description: Generate an .env.example template from a list of variable names with placeholder values.
